# SmartDocQ

SmartDocQ is an AI-powered document intelligence platform that enables users to upload, analyze, and interact with documents using Gemini AI and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

## Overview

SmartDocQ helps users extract insights from documents through conversational AI. The platform supports document understanding, semantic search, summarization, study tools, and intelligent question answering across multiple file formats.

## Capabilities

- Upload and analyze documents
- Answer questions using uploaded documents as context
- Generate concise AI summaries
- Produce flashcards for studying
- Generate quizzes from document content
- Search documents using semantic retrieval
- Extract structured information from tables

## Features

- AI-powered PDF Chat
- Document Question Answering
- AI Document Summarization
- Research Paper Analysis
- Flashcard Generation
- Quiz Generation
- Selection Summarization
- Table Extraction
- Semantic Search with RAG
- Hybrid Retrieval (Vector Search + BM25)
- Gemini AI Integration
- Shareable AI Chat Sessions

## Supported Formats

- PDF
- DOCX
- TXT
- CSV
- XLSX

## Use Cases

- Research paper analysis
- Student study assistant
- Enterprise document search
- Technical documentation Q&A
- Knowledge management
- Report summarization

## Audience

- Students
- Researchers
- Educators
- Professionals
- Technical Teams

## AI Models

- Google Gemini

## AI Architecture

- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Hybrid Retrieval
- Dense Vector Search
- BM25 Keyword Search
- Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)

## Technology

- React
- Flask
- ChromaDB Vector Database
- Gemini AI
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Semantic Vector Embeddings
- BM25 Retrieval
- Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)
